'''Brabe''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Fian/Legends|Fian]] who worked as a [[Vert'bo airship]] driver on his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Galantos]] during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He tried to fight back against [[Stima Ardella]] and the [[Black Hammer pirates]] because they drove off his customers.<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds" />

He liked to tell stories about his eight children.<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds" />
